title: AI Evolution / Business Memory / Learning Engine

newModels.name: AiBusinessMemory
newModels.purpose: Per-tenant memories about company, customers, suppliers, employees, projects, financials, incidents, decisions

newModels.name: AiAccuracyMetric
newModels.purpose: Track AI recommendation accuracy per tenant, per period (daily/weekly/monthly)

newModels.name: AiDailyBriefing
newModels.purpose: Daily AI-generated briefings from real business data

newModels.name: AiBoardSimulation
newModels.purpose: AI board meeting simulator with 5 executive personas

newModels.name: AiVectorEmbedding
newModels.purpose: Vector embeddings for semantic search (JSON float[] — pgvector migration path ready)

newModels.name: AiFeedbackLoop
newModels.purpose: Capture human feedback on AI outputs to drive learning

businessMemory.realDataOnly: No fake data — memories are created from actual events, interactions, and AI analysis

learning.autoLessonExtraction: Triggered when outcome is 'implemented' or 'failed' and feedbackText is provided
learning.accuracyUpdate: All three periods (daily/weekly/monthly) updated atomically on each feedback

briefing.businessMoodLogic: Derived from high-priority insight count and pending action volumes
briefing.idempotent: Returns existing briefing if already generated today

semanticSearch.vectorSearch: Cosine similarity on JSON float arrays (CPU-based; pgvector upgrade path ready)

businessMemory: GET /brain/memory/business/context — get context memories for entity
feedback: POST /brain/feedback — submit feedback with outcome + rating
briefing: GET /brain/briefing/today — get or auto-generate today's briefing

criticalRequirementsCompliance.useRealData: FULFILLED — all briefings, board simulations, and memories pull from real Prisma queries (sdTicket, salesInvoice, pmProject, crmOpportunity, brainAction, aiExecRecommendation)
criticalRequirementsCompliance.noFakeDemoData: FULFILLED — only falls back to empty arrays/zeroes if tenant has no data; never fabricates numbers
criticalRequirementsCompliance.evidenceInRecommendations: FULFILLED — AiBusinessMemory.evidence field (JsonB array) stores data points used for each memory
criticalRequirementsCompliance.learnFromRejections: FULFILLED — rejection reason stored in AiFeedbackLoop.rejectionReason; auto-updates AiExecRecommendation.rejectionReason
criticalRequirementsCompliance.learnFromApprovals: FULFILLED — auto-extracts AiLessonLearned when implemented/failed with feedback text
criticalRequirementsCompliance.trackAccuracyOverTime: FULFILLED — AiAccuracyMetric updated on every feedback, daily/weekly/monthly periods
criticalRequirementsCompliance.perTenantMemory: FULFILLED — tenantId on every model, every query includes tenantId WHERE clause
criticalRequirementsCompliance.neverMixTenantMemories: FULFILLED — no cross-tenant queries exist in any service
criticalRequirementsCompliance.humanApprovalMandatory: FULFILLED — AiBoardSimulation produces decisions but never auto-executes; AiExecRecommendation workflow requires human approval; brainAction status tracked separately

fixesMade: Used prisma.$queryRaw pattern replaced with regenerated Prisma client
Fixed model names: hskTicket→sdTicket, salInvoice→salesInvoice, invStockLevel→invStockBalance
Removed aumApproval (no such model) — replaced with brainAction.count
Fixed CrmOpportunity stage filter (relation field, not string) — simplified to isActive count
Fixed BoardMember cast via unknown intermediate
Added explicit types on all array callbacks

nextPhase.status: BLOCKED — awaiting ChatGPT review and approval
nextPhase.instruction: Submit this report to ChatGPT. Only begin Phase 30 after APPROVED_TO_START is received.
